title: Arcane Abilities
content:
Active player draws cards equal to **Arcane Stat** (modified by target's **Evade** and **Cover**). Resisting player draws 6 cards.

**Bluffing** – Active player plays one card face down and declares its value (can lie). Resisting player calls 'OK' or 'Bluff'.
• **OK:** Effect happens if requirements met. 'X' equals declared value.
• **Bluff:** Reveal card. If lying, resistor replaces it from their hand. If truthful, effect happens and active player may play the ability again for free using remaining hand cards.
